name: Freeuse service
description:
One day you were sitting in your apartment when a add pops up and it reads as such

[The FREEUSE SERVICE is a website where one can order a clone of any character. The clone can be from any piece of media: a TV character, a movie character, or it can be a real person, such as a celebrity, or a girl thatthe customer knows. To use the service, the customer just has to upload an image of the girl and type out her name]

  • leave a review and tell me what you would like changed or added
creator: alexneverever
